svg.title: Evalio — Premium Logo System, Dark and Light Mode
svg.desc: Two versions of the Evalio logo: dark mode (white on near-black) and light mode (near-black on near-white). Each shows a geometric symbol mark beside the wordmark "Evalio".

text.style: font-family: -apple-system,'Inter Tight','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif; font-size:20px; font-weight:500; fill:#FAFAFA; letter-spacing:-0.03em;;fill:rgb(250, 250, 250);stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:-apple-system, "Inter Tight", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
